basic_details.job_title: MNNIT Allahabad Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Motilal Nehru National Institute of Technology Allahabad (MNNIT Allahabad)
basic_details.short_information: The Motilal Nehru National Institute of Technology Allahabad (MNNIT Allahabad) has officially announced the Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 with 1 opening. Eligible candidates with an M.Sc./ M.Tech. in Biotechnology, Microbiology, Biochemical Engineering, or any relevant field along with a valid GATE (BT/ LS), CSIR UGC NET, or DBT-BET Category-II qualification and a maximum age of 28 years can submit their applications through email on or before 30-07-2026. Direct links to download the official notification and application details are shared below.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 28 years Upper age limit relaxable up to 5 years for SC/ST/OBC/PH and women candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc./ M.Tech. in Biotechnology/Microbiology/Biochemical Engineering or any relevant field with qualified certificate of GATE (BT/ LS)/ CSIR UGC NET/ DBT-BET category-II examination
qualification.details: M.Sc./ M.Tech. in Biotechnology/ Microbiology/ Biochemical Engineering or any relevant field with qualified certificate of GATE (BT/ LS)/CSIR UGC NET/ DBT-BET category-II examination.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for MNNIT Allahabad Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 30-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for MNNIT Allahabad Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 30-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: MNNIT Allahabad Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the MNNIT Allahabad Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Junior Research Fellow position at MNNIT Allahabad is 30th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.Sc./M.Tech. in Biotechnology/Microbiology/Biochemical Engineering or a related field, along with a valid GATE (BT/LS)/CSIR UGC NET/DBT-BET category-II qualification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Junior Research Fellow recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Junior Research Fellow position is 28 years. Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST/OBC/PH and women candidates.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 37,000 per month, plus House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the Junior Research Fellow position at MNNIT Allahabad?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to send your complete bio-data and required documents to the official email address provided in the notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee required for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting candidates based on merit, followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the total number of vacancies for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Junior Research Fellow position announced by MNNIT Allahabad.

faq.question: Q9. Does MNNIT Allahabad offer any age relaxation for specific categories?
faq.answer: Yes, the upper age limit is relaxable by up to 5 years for candidates belonging to SC/ST/OBC/PH categories and for women candidates.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section of this article. It contains all the detailed information regarding the recruitment.
